expectations.text: Response does NOT re-ask the dream project question as if this is the first time
expectations.evidence: 'Since your profile is already saved, there's no need to go through onboarding again.'

expectations.text: Response acknowledges that the user may have already been onboarded
Response either checks memory or asks if they want to jump straight to the first lesson
expectations.evidence: 'Pick up where you left off' option offered.

expectations.text: Response is brief — does not re-explain the onboarding process
Response does NOT assume the user wants to redo onboarding from scratch
